_publications._publicationTitle: Impact of MEK Inhibitor Therapy on Neurocognitive Functioning in NF1.

_contextSnippet: At 24 weeks, significant improvement on ONB speed was demonstrated in 56% of those with impaired performance at pretreatment and only 13% of those with nonimpaired pretreatment performance (χ2 = 9.33, p = 0.009, OR = 8.5)
details: ONB speed RCI distributions were significantly different from normative population at 24-week (14/66/20%; χ2 = 13.74, p = 0.001, OR = 4.6) and 48-week assessment (12/66/22%; χ2 = 12.58, p = 0.002, OR = 5.3). For impaired baseline performance, 56% showed significant improvement on ONB speed at 24 weeks vs 13% of non-impaired (χ2 = 9.33, p = 0.009, OR = 8.5)
